songs.subject: varied
songs.lyrics:
Black umbrella up, we step
Slow roll past Saint Claude
White shoes on the curb
Drumline keep the law
Mama in her Sunday best
Knee-high lace and gold
We don’t cry alone tonight
We carry what we hold

Hear that snare?
That’s the door
Open wide
We want more
One by one
Feet come right
From the chapel
To the night

March him home, march him home
Through the rain and bone
March him home, march him home
Let the whole block know
Hey now, hey now
We don’t walk alone
March him home, march him home
Bring that trumpet on

Benches on the folded street
Trombone grins and bends
Auntie throws her hands up high
Then the crying ends
Rice on shoes and brass in air
Dirt turned to a song
Every step says he was here
And we’re still going strong

Hear that snare?
That’s the door
Open wide
We want more
One by one
Feet come right
From the chapel
To the night

March him home, march him home
Through the rain and bone
March him home, march him home
Let the whole block know
Hey now, hey now
We don’t walk alone
March him home, march him home
Bring that trumpet on

Now the brass gets fierce
Now the tears turn bright
Shoes hit gravel, heels hit wood
Till the whole sky sways tonight
Tell the truth with a horn
Tell it bold and plain
Heaven, let the back line in
We’re coming down your lane

March him home, march him home
Through the rain and bone
March him home, march him home
Let the wh

songs.subject: varied
songs.lyrics:
Sunrise paints the kitchen wall
Another day
Another call
He stares at me
Eyes like saucers
Anticipatin' breakfast
No pauses
Just a soft whine
A hopeful sigh
He knows the routine
So do I

Wait
Little friend
Wait
That's the lesson
Hard and straight
Patience is a quiet stream
Not a rushing
Anxious dream
Wait
Little friend
Wait
It ain't too late

The leash hangs by the back door
He watches it
Then me
Then more
A little dance
A happy spin
Knows where we're goin'
Where we've been
But the collar stays upon the hook
Just a long
Long
Silent look

Wait
Little friend
Wait
That's the lesson
Hard and straight
Patience is a quiet stream
Not a rushing
Anxious dream
Wait
Little friend
Wait
It ain't too late

He lays his head upon my knee
A heavy sigh
Just him and me
The world outside can rush and shout
But in this room
We work

songs.subject: varied
songs.lyrics:
You circle by the door
Tail like a metronome
I hold the leash in two hands
And let the silence grow
Your nose goes to the crack
Your paws say "now, now, now"
I point to the worn-out mat
And you flop down somehow

Good boy, take your time
Let the world go by
One paw, then the other
Easy now, easy

Sit and wait, my friend
Sit and wait
Not every door
Opens right away
Sit and wait, my friend
Sit and wait
I am here
We don't need to race

The mail cart rattles past
You lift your ears and lean
A squirrel cuts through the yard
And pulls your whole heart clean
I rub behind your ear
You press into my knee
Like patience is a treat
You can learn with me

Good boy, take your time
Let the world go by
One paw, then the other
Easy now, easy

Sit and wait, my friend
Sit and wait
Not every door
Opens right away
Sit and wait, my friend
Sit and wait
I am here
We don't need to race

Winter taps the window
Rain marks up the pane
You count the steps I take
Then settle down again
And I learn from you
How still can feel so bright
How love can bend its knees
And stay a while tonight

Sit and wait, my friend
Sit and wait
Not every door
Opens right away
Sit and wait, my friend
Sit and wait
I am here
We don't need to race

songs.subject: varied
songs.lyrics:
Sat down at Slim's
with a worn-out deck
Dimes in my pocket
and a cross on my neck
Dealer grinned wide
like he knew my name
He said, "Best two out"
and I took the game

First hand hit easy
I got cocky fast
Second hand cruel
like a bottle glass
Slim slid a look
at the man by the door
I should've walked out
when I won that four

Then the room got still
Still as the grave
One more card turned
and I lost my way
He tapped that table
like a judge in black
Said, "You play for keeps,
boy, you can't step back"

Too far, too far
I went too far
(Gone too far)
Too far, too far
I went too far
(Too far)
Now the house wants blood
and the night got hard

Queen of spades
with a burn mark on the face
Ace of hearts
felt cold in my place
Slim said, "Pay up"
with a smile like sin
I saw my whole life
in the bottle's rim

Then the room got still
Still as the grave
One more card turned
and I lost my way
He tapped that table
like a judge in black
Said, "You play for keeps,
boy, you can't step back"

Too far, too far
I went too far
(Gone too far)
Too far, too far
I went too far
(Too far)
Now the house wants blood
and the night got hard

Back door swinging
and the dogs set loose
I left my luck
on that green felt noose
If you hear my boots
go cutting through the rain
Tell my mama I was
born to the pain

Too far, too far
I went too far
(Gone too far)
Too far, too far
I went too far
(Too far)
Now the house wants blood
and the night got hard

Deal me mercy
if you got a spare
I can hear that table
creak like a prayer
Too far, too far
and the devil won the card
songs.lyrics_en:
Sat down at Slim's
with a worn-out deck
Dimes in my pocket
and a cross on my neck
Dealer grinned wide
like he knew my name
He said, "Best two out"
and I took the game

First hand hit easy
I got cocky fast
Second hand cruel
like a bottle glass
Slim slid a look
at the man by the door
I should've walked out
when I won that four

Then the room got still
Still as the grave
One more card turned
and I lost my way
He tapped that table
like a judge in black
Said, "You play for keeps,
boy, you can't step back"

Too far, too far
I went too far
(Gone too far)

and the night got hard

songs.subject: varied
songs.lyrics:
We sat by the mudflat
With a deck gone thin
Moon in the bottle
And a grin like sin
I cut that first hand
You said, “Deal me in”
(Deal me in)
The leech water rising
And the game went on

Your ace came slick
My queen came mean
Your ring on the table
Like a cold brass sheen
You laughed too loud
I called that bluff
(Call that bluff)
The frogs got quiet
When the cards got rough

Jack slid low
And the pot ran hot
One more lay down
Or you lose the lot
Your eyes got hard
Mine would not
Would not

Gone too far
Gone too far
That deck got cursed
Gone too far
Gone too far
Now the river wants
What we lost

I saw you palm
A marked-up five
I saw my luck
Try to stay alive
You tapped your knife
On the table slow
(Tapped so slow)
Then the screen door shook
In the swamp wind blow

Two more hands
And the truth came out
Your smile split wide
With a busted shout
We both reached in
For the final throw
(Final throw)
And the candles bent
Like they knew to go

Jack slid low
And the pot ran hot
One more lay down
Or you lose the lot
Your eyes got hard
Mine would not
Would not

Gone too far
Gone too far
That deck

songs.subject: varied
songs.lyrics:
I saw you by the wall
Lacing up slow
White socks, purple wheels
And a ribbon in your hair
You caught my eye
Right as the DJ spun
And my heart did a spin
On the checkerboard floor

You said, "Meet me halfway"
By the prize booth glow
One lap, then two
And the whole room knows

Roll with me
Roll with me
Under the mirror ball
Roll with me
Roll with me
Don’t let go at all
(roll with me)
Your hand in mine
My knees go weak
We keep it smooth
We keep it sweet

You took my hand
Past the rainbow cones
We traced little circles
On the painted lane
Your laugh hit gold
When I nearly slipped
Then you pulled me close
Like you knew my name

You said, "Stay on my left"
As the speakers shook
One more turn
And you stole my look

Roll with me
Roll with me
Under the mirror ball
Roll with me
Roll with me
Don’t let go at all
(roll with me)
Your hand in mine
My knees go weak
We keep it smooth
We keep it sweet

The floor went hushed
For a blink, for a breath
Then your wheels came back
Like a promise kept
You leaned in near
And the whole night blazed
One kiss, one curve
Then the lights turned pink

Roll with me
Roll with me
Under the mirror ball
Roll with me
Roll with me
Don’t let go at all
(roll with me)
Your hand in mine
My knees go weak
We keep it smooth
We keep it sweet
Roll with me
Roll with me
Till the last song leaves

songs.subject: varied
songs.lyrics:
You rolled in late
Shoelaces glowing
I was on lane seven
Trying not to fall
You laughed at my spin
Then gave me your hand
And the whole rink blinked
Like it knew our names

Round and round
Your wheels traced mine
Heart on the rail
Just in time

Skate with me, baby
Hold me close
Skate with me, baby
Don’t let go
Mirrorball skates
And your gold-kiss smile
Mirrorball skates
Stay one more mile (one more mile)

Popcorn in your palm
Sugar on your sleeve
You said, “Take the outside”
I said, “If you lead”
Your jacket spun out
At the corner turn
And I caught that look
Like a spark on a nerve

Round and round
Your wheels traced mine
Cheek to cheek
All through the line

Skate with me, baby
Hold me close
Skate with me, baby
Don’t let go
Mirrorball skates
And your gold-kiss smile
Mirrorball skates
Stay one more mile (one more mile)

When the floor lights flash
And the crowd slides by
Put your hand in mine
Let the old world fly
If we wipe out now
We’ll laugh, we’ll glow
I found my home
In your two-by-two

Skate with me, baby
Hold me close
Skate with me, baby
Don’t let go
Mirrorball skates
And your gold-kiss smile
Mirrorball skates
Stay one more mile (one more mile)

songs.subject: varied
songs.lyrics:
They talk over me
Again and again
Words just get lost
Down a drain
My voice unheard
A silent scream

Mouthful of fury
Gonna spit it out
No more silence
Gonna shout
Mouthful of fury
Hear me now

He cuts me off
Mid-sentence
His ego swells
My patience thin
Another idea
Lost to the wind

Mouthful of fury
Gonna spit it out
No more silence
Gonna shout
Mouthful of fury
Hear me now

Why do you do this
Every damn time
Is my insight worthless
A waste of your time
I'm just as smart
Just as keen

Mouthful of fury
Gonna spit it out
No

songs.subject: varied
songs.lyrics:
I got my notes on paper
I got my hand half-raised
You cut right through my sentence
Like I wasn't in the room
You say, "Let's move along"
While I'm still in the middle
I watch you steal my meaning
Then pat yourself on the back

I am not a pause
I am not a nod
I am the whole damn point
And you keep stepping on it

Let me speak
Let me speak
Say my name out loud
Let me speak
Let me speak
I am not background now
(tell 'em) let me speak
(let me speak)

You love my idea
When it comes out of your mouth
Funny how it gets heavier
When it's wearing your suit now
I clock each little smile
Each hand wave, each "good thought"
You talk over my throat
Then ask why I went cold

I am not too much
I am not too loud
I am the whole damn room
So pull your chair back now

Let me speak
Let me speak
Say my name out loud
Let me speak
Let me speak
I am not background now
(tell 'em) let me speak
(let me speak)

I bring receipts in red ink
I bring facts in my fist
I bring every girl in the back
Who knows exactly what this is
One more time, you interrupt
One more time, I stand
This meeting is not your kingdom
It is a table, and I am here

Let me speak
Let me speak
Say my name out loud
Let me speak
Let me speak
I am not background now
(tell 'em) let me speak
(let me speak)
Let me sp

songs.subject: varied
songs.lyrics:
The water warm it runs
Through silver strands so fine
A lifetime etched in every line
My hand it trembles some

Your eyes they close
A gentle sigh

Oh silver strands a river flows
Memories soft and slow
My hands they know
This tender glow

The shampoo scent it fills the air
A fragrance from long ago
I comb it out so very slow
A silent prayer a whispered care

Time it steals so much away
But moments like these they stay
A quiet grace a gentle way
Forever etched in yesterday
Soap in Your Hair

Sit down, ma
Let me help you
Towel on your shoulders
Basin in the sink
Your gray hair pools
Like river foam
In my hands
It feels so thin

You close your eyes
Like you trust me
Just like when I was small
And the day was too big
I part the strands
Slow and careful
Soap runs white
Past your temple

You laugh and say
My hands are cold
I warm them up

songs.subject: varied
songs.lyrics:
Easy now, easy now
Let me wash your hair
Easy now, easy now
I know where it hurts
No rush here, no rush here
I’ve got all night
Easy now, easy now
I’m here by your side

I see your face
Under the wet shine
The lines at your mouth
The bend of your brow
The same old chin
The same old story
Just a little softer
Than I knew somehow

You say you’re fine
And I believe you
Still I hold the bowl
A little longer
Rinse by rinse
I learn your name again
Not as the parent
As the woman I love

Easy now, easy now
Let me wash your hair
Easy now, easy now
I know where it hurts
No rush here, no rush here
I’ve got all night
Easy now, easy now
I’m here by your side

If the world was cruel
To your body
Let it end right here
In this war

songs.subject: varied
songs.lyrics:
I climbed that stair in the rain
Keys in my teeth, still ready
Took the old box from the crate
Now the whole block know me already
Names on the board? Mine
Every one of them lights go red
I tune that dial with a grin
Then I let that shell talk bread
Night shift, I’m under the roof
Little green glow in the shack
Cup of tea gone cold on the sill
While I line up shells in the rack
I got ears on the council estate
I got ears in the taxi rank
If you want that signal, come close
I’m the one they can’t unplug

Hear that crackle?
That’s my warning
Spin it back
When the crowd come storming

Antenna on the roof
That’s mine, that’s mine
Pirate on the air
All mine, all mine
Turn that knob and prove
You can’t touch this line
Antenna on the roof
Mine, mine, mine

I run it like rent day, strict
No slack when the red light spins
Big tune drop and the room get live
Then the whole back row just grins
I got runners with cases of wax
Got a youth with a torch at the door
Got a mate in the van downstairs
Saying, “Boss, they want ten more”
When the feds creep close, I’m cool
I just move from the desk to the kit
Swap one board, flip the feed
Then the signal comes back, legit
You can’t cage what I built from scraps
You can’t fold what I made from noise
Every Sunday I raise that flag
And the whole ends hear my voice

Hear that crackle?
That’s my warning
Spin it back
When the crowd come storming

Antenna on the roof
That’s mine, that’s mine
Pirate on the air
All mine, all mine
Turn that knob and prove
You can’t touch this line
Antenna on the roof
Mine, mine, mine

Dead quiet for a second
Then the static blooms
One hand on the mic
One eye on the rooms
I built this from nothing
From bolts and fumes
Now the whole place shakes
When I say, “Tune in”

Antenna on the roof
That’s mine, that’s mine
Pirate on the air
All mine, all mine
Turn that knob and prove
You can’t touch this line
Antenna on the roof
Mine, mine, mine

songs.subject: varied
songs.lyrics:
I’ve got the loft on lock
Mast up, box gone hot
Ain’t no permit, mate
Still I run that spot
Mics in a milk crate stack
Cable tied, blacked out rack
Antenna kissing the rain
And the whole block knows my tag
Late-night voices land
Through a hacked-up FM band
When I say “reload”, they spin
Like the whole street’s in my hand
Broadband kids can’t touch this
I came up on a switch and hiss
Doorbell off, phone on mute
I make the whole estate my pit

Pirate radio, pirate radio
Tune in quick, then watch it go
Pirate radio, pirate radio
My station, my rules, my show
Pirate radio, pirate radio
From the roof to the road below
Pirate radio, pirate radio
Say my name when the signal rolls

I run the nights like a syndicate
Headset on, I’m in the mix
Tea gone cold by half past one
Still I shell one more and lift
Caller line burning up
Kids all shouting, “turn it up!”
I got old heads, young ones too
Same big grin when the riddim cuts
Van parked round the back
If the van’s seen, then we adapt
Clip that mast, move that crate
Come back stronger, double stacked
Try trace me, you’ll waste your day
I’m three steps where the crumbs won’t stay
One hand on the desk, one on the deck
And the whole room bends my way

Pirate radio, pirate radio
Tune in quick, then watch it go
Pirate radio, pirate radio
My station, my rules, my show
Pirate radio, pirate radio
From the roof to the road below
Pirate radio, pirate radio
Say my name when the signal rolls

Switch off the grid
I still get through
You hear that crackle?
That’s me and my crew

Pirate radio, pirate radio
Tune in quick, then watch it go
Pirate radi

songs.lyrics:
The sign came down in rain
One Thursday by the square
Jean wiped the last two cups
Then stood and stared
The sugar jar was empty
The chairs were turned around
Even the little bell
Forgot its sound

I still see your red scarf there
Folded on the chair
I still hear the waitress laugh
Floating in the air

Ah, mon café
You closed your door
Ah, mon café
I come no more
The bread is gone
The chairs are bare
But I still sit
Like you were there

The chalkboard kept one word
Faded in soft white dust
Bons baisers on the glass
And a crack of rust
The owner locked the shutters
With shaking hands and slow
He said, "It was a good life"
Then let it go

I keep the cup you broke
Near my window light
A little blue chip missing
From that final night

Ah, mon café
You closed your door
Ah, mon café
I come no more
The bread is gone
The chairs are bare
But I still sit
Like you were there

Now the street keeps moving
Boots and buses pass
But time walks softer
In that broken glass
If I close my eyes
I can taste the rain
And hear the little bell
Calling me again

songs.subject: varied
songs.lyrics:
Ah, mon café
You closed your door
Ah, mon café
I come no more
The bread is gone
The chairs are bare
But I still sit
Like you were there
Ah, mon café
One last refrain
Your empty room
Still knows my name
Adieu Mon Amour Café

The scent of coffee grounds still hangs
In the empty morning air
A ghost of laughter
A phantom song a sad affair
Where did all the people go
The poets and the dreamers too
The little tables once so bright
Now just dust and shadows blue

Adieu mon amour café
My sweet old friend my yesterday
The sugar cubes the steaming cups
All gone away
Adieu mon amour café
No more bonjour no more good day
Just memories
And silent gray

I pass by the windowpane
See my reflection dim and worn
A thousand stories
In that space were born
The clinking of the porcelain
The whispers soft the arguments loud
Now only echoes
In the lonely crowd

The old man with his newspaper
The young girl with her secret smile
The lovers holding hands
Just for a little while
They all had their moments here
A tiny universe so grand
Now just a boarded door
In this forgotten land

Adieu mon amour café
My sweet old friend my yesterday
The sugar cubes the steaming cups
All gone away
Adieu mon amour café
No more bonjour no

songs.subject: varied
songs.lyrics:
Main Street's full of tailgates
Truck beds and folding chairs
Moms in red and black hats
Kids with face paint everywhere
Old man Joe rang the bell
At the hardware store by eight
Said "boys, tonight we bring it home"
And nobody made him wait

Bleachers start to shake
Band starts counting off
You can feel that old town pride
Coming up strong

Friday night hometown
Shake that whole stand down
(Homecoming game)
Friday night hometown
We don't back down now
(Homecoming game)
Under them lights tonight
We're gonna make this town proud
Friday night hometown
(Homecoming game)

Pep rally in the gym
Paper crowns and shouting kids
Coach with his shirt untucked
Said "play like your granddad did"
The cheer squad hit the floor
Pom-poms flying in the air
I saw you in the home bleachers
And the whole night caught on there

Bleachers start to shake
Band starts counting off
You can feel that old town pride
Coming up strong

Friday night hometown
Shake that whole stand down
(Homecoming game)
Friday night hometown
We don't back down now
(Homecoming game)
Under them lights tonight
We're gonna make this town proud
Friday night hometown
(Homecoming game)

Fourth quarter, score tied up
Mud on every knee
Goal line crowd is screaming
Like it's family
One last snap, one last drive
Then the whole place came alive
When that ball crossed through the dark
Man, you should've heard that cry

Friday night hometown
Shake that whole stand down
(Homecoming game)
Friday night hometown
We don't back down now
(Homecoming game)
Under them lights tonight
We're gonna make this town proud
Friday night hometown
(Homecoming game)
Friday night hometown
We got that small-town sound
(Homecoming game)

songs.subject: varied
songs.lyrics:
Main Street’s packed tight
Under bleachers and flags
Tailgate smoke in the air
Jacket sleeves, letterman tags
Mama’s in the stands
Dad’s got that grin
We’ve been waiting all week
Now it’s kicking off again

Band starts marching in
Ground starts shaking low
Coach says one more time
Son, now let it go
Heart beats in my chest
Like a drumline call
When that whistle cuts the night
We’re gonna give it all

Homecoming, homecoming
Raise it up, raise it up
Homecoming, homecoming
Never get enough
Friday night, we’re alive
When the home team rolls
Homecoming, homecoming
Right back home

Cheerleaders on the track
Pom-poms in the glow
Fresh-cut grass and popcorn
Cold dew on my boots below
Little kids on the rail
Eyes wide as the moon
Everybody knows the score
Even before the tune

Band starts marching in
Ground starts shaking low
Coach says one more time
Son, now let it go
Heart beats in my chest
Like a drumline call
When that whistle cuts the night
We’re gonna give it all

Homecoming, homecoming
Raise it up, raise it up
Homecoming, homecoming
Never get enough
Friday night, we’re alive
When the home team rolls
Homecoming, homecoming
Right back home

I can hear my name
From the far back row
Same old faces, same old roads
Same bright afterglow
We were raised on this
On this field, on this fight
And we’ll sing it all the way
Till the break of light

Homecoming, homecoming
Raise it up, raise it up
Homecoming, homecoming
Never get

songs.subject: varied
songs.lyrics:
I find the same blue door
At the edge of sleep
You say my name once
Then the floor falls clean
My coat turns to clouds
In the back of the dark
I rise past the window
Past the yard with the bark

And I know this road
I know this sky
My hands go loose
My heart goes light

I fly, I fly
Over the water
I fly, I fly
Nothing can hold her
(again, again)
I wake with the sky on my tongue

The dream brings back
That bend in the pine
Where the moon hangs low
Like a stolen dime
I pass the roofs
Like songs in a crowd
I reach for your hand
But I drift too high

And I know this road
I know this sky
My hands go loose
My heart goes light

I fly, I fly
Over the water
I fly, I fly
Nothing can hold her
(again, again)
I wake with the sky on my tongue

If I come down
Don't make me stay
I learned this height
The hard dream way
Just one more turn
One more open air
I almost remember
How I got there

I fly, I fly
Over the water
I fly, I fly
Nothing can hold her
(again, again)
I wake with the sky on my tongue

songs.subject: varied
songs.lyrics:
I know this hallway
I know that blue
The door is open
And I step through
My feet go quiet
My lungs go wide
The ceiling parts
Like a tide

And I feel it coming back
That easy pull
The world falls under me
So slow, so full

I fly again
I fly again
You call my name
I rise above the rain
I fly again
I fly again
(again, again)
And nothing feels the same

Over the rooftops
Over the yards
The sleeping houses
Look small and hard
I brush the clouds
Like old white lace
Then wake up smiling
With wind on my face

And I feel it coming back
That easy pull
The world falls under me
So slow, so full

I fly again
I fly again
You call my name
I rise above the rain
I fly again
I fly again
(again, again)
And nothing feels the same

If I drift too far
I know the way
The dream returns
When I’m afraid
One open door
One breath, one sky
I close my eyes
And start to fly

I fly again
I fly again
You call my name
I rise above the rain
I fly again
I fly again

songs.subject: varied
songs.lyrics:
They came at dawn with papers
Marked the fence with red
Bean vines tied to wire
Still asleep in bed
Old hands in the dirt
Kids with painted nails
We watched our summer grow
Between the rows of kale

Don’t say it’s progress
When the soil still bleeds
Don’t call that a future
If it buries our seeds

Not my garden
Not today
Hands off our garden
Take your blade away
Not my garden
Hear us sing
We planted a home here
You can’t take everything

Mrs. Diaz brought the mint
From her mother’s yard
Little June named every squash
And watered twice, real hard
Mr. Lee fixed broken beds
With copper and old nails
Now his peach tree shakes
Like it already knows the tale

Don’t say it’s progress
When the soil still bleeds
Don’t call that a future
If it buries our seeds

Not my garden
Not today
Hands off our garden
Take your blade away
Not my garden
Hear us sing
We planted a home here
You can’t take everything

I saw the bulldozer line
Like a blackened row of teeth
But I heard the tomatoes
Still calling underneath
From the compost to the fence line
From the roots beneath the clay
We are not the kind of people
You can scrape and throw away

Not my garden
Not today
Hands off our garden
Take your blade away
Not my garden
Hear us sing
We planted a home here
You can’t take everything

songs.subject: varied
songs.lyrics:
They came at dawn with a paper grin
Marked our rows in red
Beans still climbing on the wire
Dirt under my nails
Marta cried beside the fence
Said, "That's my father's corn"
Now the blade is kissing roots
Where our children played

Who told them this was empty?
Who said this land was bare?
Every seed we placed in springtime
Still remembers us there

Hands off our ground
Hands off our ground
This soil knows our names
Hands off our ground
Hands off our ground
We are not the same

Mr. Lee kept jars of rain
In the shed by the shed
Angela brought collard greens
Wrapped in Sunday thread
Baby shoes on the back steps
Tomatoes on the vine
Now the trucks are chewing history
One hard bite at a time

Who told them this was empty?
Who said this land was bare?
Every seed we placed in springtime
Still remembers us there

Hands off our ground
Hands off our ground
This soil knows our names
Hands off our ground
Hands off our ground
We are not the same

If they take the beds tonight
We'll plant in the cracks
If they tear down every fence
We'll come back
With our hands up full of dirt
With our hands up full of light
You can crush the fence line
You can't crush this life

Hands off our ground
Hands off our ground
This soil knows our names
Hands off our ground
Hands off our ground
We are not the same
Hands off our ground
Hands off our ground
We will rise again

songs.subject: varied
songs.lyrics:
My name is Mittens
I chase my tail
I bark at the mailman
I never fail
To dig up the garden
A real good boy
My human they wonder
What brings me such joy

Woof woof meow
That's my sound right now
A dog in cat fur
Hear my happy purr
I'm a canine kitty
A furry city
Stray from the norm
Through sunshine and storm

I fetch the red ball
Bring it back to you
I pant when it's hot out
What else can I do
To prove my true nature
A loyal best friend
A wagging devotion
Until the very end

Woof woof meow
That's my sound right now
A dog in cat fur
Hear my happy purr
I'm a canine kitty
A furry city
Stray from the norm
Through sunshine and storm

They say I'm a feline
A creature of night
But I love the daylight
And chasing squirrels with all my might
I guard the front door
With a mighty roar
Or a meow so fierce
It makes your heart pierce

Woof woof meow
That's my sound right now
A dog in cat fur
Hear my happy purr
I'm a canine kitty

songs.subject: varied
songs.lyrics:
Whiskers twitchin' tail a waggin'
I'm a dog I'm not a cat
See me chasin' squirrels a braggin'
Never nap on a welcome mat

Woof woof meow no wait woof woof
I'm a dog a furry goof
Got my leash and I'm ready to play
A happy dog every single day

Scratchin' at the back door barkin'
For a walk in the park so grand
Neighbors stare they start remarkin'
What's that cat with a ball in his hand

Woof woof meow no wait woof woof
I'm a dog a furry goof
Got my leash and I'm ready to play
A happy dog every single day

They say I purr they say I climb
But my heart beats like a hound
Best in show I'll win this time
The best doggie in this whole town

Woof woof meow no wait woof woof
I'm a dog

songs.subject: varied
songs.lyrics:
The nets hang dry
On the chapel nails
The tide took names
And left the rails
The bread went green
In the smokehouse jar
A bell still rings
From under the tar

Oh, listen close
At the turning foam
You can hear our doors
Still asking home

Salt beneath us
Salt around us
Bring us back
Bring us back
(Bring us back)
Salt beneath us
Salt around us
We are here
We are here
(Still here)

The well is full
Of a moonlit black
My mother called
But the waves looked back
The churchyard grass
Bends bone-white low
Where the river mouth
Let the village go

Oh, listen close
To the split sea-floor
Every lost voice
Knocks at your door

Salt beneath us
Salt around us
Bring us back
Bring us back
(Bring us back)
Salt beneath us
Salt around us
We are here
We are here
(Still here)

No lantern burns
Where the boats once slept
Only the gulls
And the vows we kept
Hold out your hand
To the cold, cold deep
We were the shore
Now we do not sleep

Salt beneath us
Salt around us
Bring us back
Bring us back
(Bring us back)
Salt beneath us
Salt around us
We are here
We are here
(Still here)

Every lost voice
Knocks at your door

Salt beneath us
Salt around us
Bring us back
Bring us back
(Bring us back)
Salt beneath us
Salt around us
We are here
We are here
(Still here)

No lantern burns
Where the boats once slept
Only the gulls
And the vows we kept
Hold out your hand
To the cold, cold deep
We were the shore
Now we do not sleep

Salt beneath us
Salt around us
Bring us back
Bring us back
(Bring us back)
Salt beneath us
Salt around us
We are here
We are here
(Still here)

songs.subject: varied
songs.lyrics:
At the foot of the bay
the houses learned to kneel
Windows full of salt
and gulls on every sill
Mothers called the names
through curtains of the spray
But the tide took the road
and kept the doors away

Hush now, hear the rattle
of the emptied prayer
Boots in the silt
like somebody was there

Come back, come back
from the cold black water
Come back, come back
to your sons and daughters
Salt on the tongue
and the bells all broken
Come back, come back
with the drowned names spoken

The chapel lost its roof
the week the lantern fell
We sang to the foam
like it could cast a spell
Fish in the wash
and cups in the sand
Every little street
slid through our hands

Hush now, hear the rattling
in the buried pew
One long note rising
from the mud we knew

Come back, come back
from the cold black water
Come back, come back
to your sons and daughters
Salt on the tongue
and the bells all broken
Come back, come back
with the drowned names spoken

I stood by the pier
where the fire once slept
And the moon pulled back
what the deep had kept
One by one
I called them near
Only the waves
came clear, came clear

Come back, come back
from the cold black water
Come back, come back
to your sons and daughters
Salt on the tongue
and the b

songs.subject: varied
songs.lyrics:
I sprinted up the curb
Saw the taillights wave goodbye
My card still in my hand
Like a joke I couldn’t buy
One shoe full of rain
One sleeve full of bad luck
The driver didn’t even brake
Just rolled me out of luck

Now the sign says ten
The street says wait
My phone says low
And my luck says late

I missed the last bus home
I missed the last bus home
Now I’m stuck out here
With a cold coin in my coat
I missed the last bus home
I missed the last bus home
Hey, hey, hey
I’m walking this joke

The corner store is closed
The deli’s pulling down its gate
A kid on a bike laughs once
Then vanishes through the rain
I call your name to the dark
Like it might call back
But only the crosswalk blinks
And the pavement spits it back

Now the sign says ten
The street says wait
My phone says low
And my luck says late

I missed the last bus home
I missed the last bus home
Now I’m stuck out here
With a cold coin in my coat
I missed the last bus home
I missed the last bus home
Hey, hey, hey
I’m walking this joke

Half-time stumble
Torn up grin
If I get there at dawn
I still count it in
(keep moving)
(keep moving)
One more block
Then I’m in

I missed the last bus home
I missed the last bus home
But I’m still in the race
With my knees and my coat
I missed the last bus home
I missed the last bus home
Hey, hey, hey
I’m walking this joke
I missed the last bus home
(I missed the last bus home)
I missed the last bus home
(I missed the last bus home)

songs.subject: varied
songs.lyrics:
Streetlights blur
Empty cans clatter
Where'd the time go
Clock's a liar

My feet hurt bad
My head's a mess

Bus stop blues
Bus stop blues
No ride home
Bus stop blues

Wind bites hard
Rain starts fallin
Pockets empty
No one callin

My phone's dead now
Just my bad luck

Bus stop blues
Bus stop blues
No ride home
Bus stop blues

songs.subject: varied
songs.lyrics:
Mama laid the table out
Paper plates and folded chairs
Fried chicken by the window
Cornbread golden in the air
Sister June brought collard greens
Brother Earl said grace out loud
Everybody passed the bowls around
Like a blessing in a crowd

Oh, we came hungry
But we leave filled up
Ain't just food on the table
It's love in every cup

Pass it on, pass it on
Potluck on the table
Pass it on, pass it on
We got more than we were able
Pass it on, pass it on
Sweet mercy in the room
Pass it on, pass it on
Heaven showed up with the stew

There was peach cobbler cooling
On a red-check kitchen cloth
Little kids run through the laughter
Older hands all moving soft
Deacon Jones told his new story
How the Lord kept him alive
And the whole room said amen
Like a train rolling through the night

Oh, we came hungry
But we leave filled up
Ain't just food on the table
It's love in every cup

Pass it on, pass it on
Potluck on the table
Pass it on, pass it on
We got more than we were able
Pass it on, pass it on
Sweet mercy in the room
Pass it on, pass it on
Heaven showed up with the stew

If your hands got empty
Brother, pull up close
There's a place for your plate here
And a song for your soul
Mmm, yes
Mmm, yes

Pass it on, pass it on
Potluck on the table
Pass it on, pass it on
We got more than we were able
Pass it on, pass it on
Sweet mercy in the room
Pass it on, pass it on
Heaven showed up with the stew
Pass it on, pass it on
Everybody got enough
Pass it on, pass it on
That old church kind of love

songs.subject: varied
songs.lyrics:
Mama laid the green beans down
Beside that fried catfish plate
Sister June brought peach cobbler
And the bread came out first-rate
Deacon Ray said, “Pass it on”
With a grin and gravy stain
And the whole church leaned together
Like a roof in summer rain

Kids ran circles by the hymn books
Uncle Joe cut one clean smile
Every plate was saying
You can stay here for a while

Pass that blessing round
Pass that blessing round
See how the table holds us now
Pass that blessing round
Pass that blessing round
Pass that blessing round
One more taste, one more sound
Pass that blessing round

There was ham in a blue dish pan
And sweet tea in mason jars
Auntie cooled her aching feet
Near the fan that shook the cards
Brother Luke said grace so low
You had to lean on in to hear
Then the room got soft and holy
Like the best thing of the year

Pans were clinking like a rhythm
Forks were shining in the light
And the lonely found a seat there
By the end of Saturday night

Pass that blessing round
Pass that blessing round
See how the table holds us now
Pass that blessing round
Pass that blessing round
Pass that blessing round
One more taste, one more sound
Pass that blessing round

When the choir stepped in humming
And the cake got passed around
I saw burdens set down easy
On that worn and wooden ground
No one had to be a stranger
No one had to stand alone
Just a dozen hands of mercy
Making everybody home

Pass that blessing round
Pass that blessing round
See how the table holds us now
Pass that blessing round
Pass that blessing round
Pass that blessing round
One more taste, one more sound
Pass that blessing round

songs.subject: varied
songs.lyrics:
I took the long way home
Past our old brick stairs
The window’s been replaced
But the shape still stares
Your name’s gone from the glass
Just a clean gray face
I caught my hands on the wheel
Like I knew this place

And the street looked smaller
Than it did back then
My chest got heavy
At the stop sign again

Drive on, drive on
Past that door
Drive on, drive on
I don’t live here anymore
Your ghost in the rearview
Won’t let go
Drive on, drive on
Let it go

The mailbox leans a little
Like it’s tired too
Same busted curb by the alley
Same red sun through
A kid on a bike cut across
I hit the brake
For a second I was seventeen
And wide awake

And the street looked smaller
Than it did back then
My chest got heavy
At the stop sign again

Drive on, drive on
Past that door
Drive on, drive on
I don’t live here anymore
Your ghost in the rearview
Won’t let go
Drive on, drive on
Let it go

I don’t need the key
I don’t need the call
I don’t need to stand there
At the painted hall
Still, for one cold mile
I was back inside
With the hum of our last goodbye

Drive on, drive on
Past that door
Drive on, drive on
I don’t live here anymore
Your ghost in the rearview
Won’t let go
Drive on, drive on
Let it go
Drive on, drive on
Past that door
Drive on, drive on
I don’t live here anymore
Your ghost in the rearview
Won’t let go
Drive on, drive on
Let it go

songs.subject: varied
songs.lyrics:
I took the long way home
Past your busted gate
Same mailbox bent in half
Same stain on the screen door late
Your curtains still look tired
Like they knew my name
I kept both hands on the wheel
But my chest felt the same

There it is again
That third-floor glow
I swore I'd be fine
But you already know

Drive by, drive by
Don't look too long
Drive by, drive by
That place still hums your song
I was doing okay
Till I saw that frame
Drive by, drive by
And I said your name

The grocery cart by the curb
The broken brick on the walk
That cracked blue flower pot
Still taking rain and talk
I passed the stairwell window
Where we laughed at dawn
Now every little thing
Feels like it stayed on

There it is again
That third-floor glow
I swore I'd be fine
But you already know

Drive by, drive by
Don't look too long
Drive by, drive by
That place still hums your song
I was doing okay
Till I saw that frame
Drive by, drive by
And I said your name

I don't live there
But it lives in me
One turn, one block
And I can't break free
The dashboard's cold
My throat goes dry
I keep on moving
But I still say goodbye

Drive by, drive by
Don't look too long
Drive by, drive by
That place still hums your song
I was doing okay
Till I saw that frame
Drive by, drive by
And I said your name

songs.subject: varied
songs.lyrics:
I set one mug down
By the chipped sink light
Your apron still hangs
On the back of the chair
I open the book
To the same first page
Three potatoes, a pear
And a pinch of salt

I used to cook for two
Now I learn the turns
How much oil to pour
How long to let it burn

One plate tonight
One small flame
One plate tonight
I say your name
One plate tonight
And I’m still here
Learning how to feed
This quiet year

The onion makes me cry
I let it be
Some tears have names
Some just fall free
I stir the soup slow
Like you taught me then
Taste it, add a little more
Taste it again

The pan hums low
The window fogs
I reach for your laugh
In the steam and the fog

One plate tonight
One small flame
One plate tonight
I say your name
One plate tonight
And I’m still here
Learning how to feed
This quiet year

I used to ask the table
What you wanted most
Now I leave a space
And a second toast
For the empty side
For the unseen chair
For the love that taught me
How to stay right there

One plate tonight
One small flame
One plate tonight
I say your name
One plate tonight
And I’m still here
Learning how to feed
This quiet year

The bread goes brown
The kettle sighs
I sit with the warmth
And let it be mine

songs.subject: varied
songs.lyrics:
One onion, one pan
One hand on the knife
The cutting board rocks
Like the first week of life
He salts the water slow
As if it might hear
The house keeps its hush
But the room still feels near

He makes room for one
At the red-checkered cloth
Pours the beans in a bowl
Then sets the lid off
And the pan gives back
A small golden sound
Like the day learning
How to turn around

Just one plate tonight
Just one plate tonight
He’s learning the shape
Of a smaller light
One chair, one bite
One plate tonight
(One plate tonight)
(One plate tonight)

The recipe card
Has a thumbprint stain
And her neat little notes
In the margin remain
He laughs at the line
That says “taste as you go”
Then tastes too much salt
And lets it all show

So he starts again
With the heat turned low
A pat of butter
And a steady slow flow
The steam on the glass
Makes a soft pale bloom
He says her old name
To an empty room

Just one plate tonight
Just one plate tonight
He’s learning the shape
Of a smaller light
One chair, one bite
One plate tonight
(One plate tonight)
(One plate tonight)

And he misses the clatter
The extra fork
The warm second laugh
At the edge of the work
But the beans come tender
The bread comes warm
And grief, in the skillet,
Takes a kinder form

Just one plate tonight
Just one plate tonight
He’s learning the shape
Of a small

songs.subject: varied
songs.lyrics:
They wrote us off
Left us in the mud
Took one hard look
Said we ain't enough
We taped up our knees
We came back mean
Scrape on our helmets
Mud on the jeans

Hear that drumline roll
Hear that floor shake
One small spark
Then the whole place wakes

Brick by brick
We take it back
Brick by brick
We hit right back
Underdog heart
Big crowd roar
Brick by brick
We want more
(Brick by brick)
(We want more)

Fourth quarter cold
Scoreboard lies
Still got fire
In our eyes
Bench full of faith
Sideline loud
Every last one
Standing proud

Hear that drumline roll
Hear that floor shake
One small spark
Then the whole place wakes

Brick by brick
We take it back
Brick by brick
We hit right back
Underdog heart
Big crowd roar
Brick by brick
We want more
(Brick by brick)
(We want more)

Let 'em count us out
Let 'em point and grin
We don't need a crown
To know we win
One more push
One more run
When the whistle blows
We're the one

Brick by brick
We take it back
Brick by brick
We hit right back
Underdog heart
Big crowd roar
Brick by brick
We want more
Brick by brick
Till the game's ours
Brick by brick
We go hard
Underdog heart
Front row roar
Brick by brick
We want more
(Brick by brick)
(We want more)

We don't need a crown

One more push
One more run

We're the one

Brick by brick
We hit right back

Big crowd roar

songs.subject: varied
songs.lyrics:
Dusty cleats and muddy knees
We ain't got no fancy pedigree
Underdogs yeah that's our name
But we play this crazy game

Fight fight fight with all your might
Shine so bright in the fading light
Victory is calling loud and clear
No time for doubt no time for fear

They laugh they scoff they turn their heads
But we got fire in our guts instead
Every pass every single play
We gonna make them regret this day

Hear that roar
Want some more

Fight fight fight with all your might
Shine so bright in the fading light
Victory is calling loud and clear
No time for doubt no time for fear

Sweat and grit our only plan
We're the best darn team in the whole

songs.subject: varied
songs.lyrics:
Morning on the curtains
Coffee gone cold
Black shoes by the door
Still neat, still whole
Your coat on the chair
Like you might come back
But the house holds its breath
And the walls stay black

I keep the ashtray
Full on the shelf
I keep your name here
Soft to myself

Ashes on the table
Ashes on the table
I say your name
And it stays a little longer
Ashes on the table
Ashes on the table
The day keeps moving
But I move slower

The flowers are bending
In a glass by the sink
Thin yellow petals
Tremble and sink
Your sister called early
Said, "Eat something small"
I stared at the plate
And I answered it all

I keep the porch light
Even in day
Like there’s still a road
That might bring you this way

Ashes on the table
Ashes on the table
I say your name
And it stays a little longer
Ashes on the table
Ashes on the table
The day keeps moving
But I move slower

Nothing is broken
That can be found
It’s just the quiet
Making its sound
I touch the doorway
You used to lean on
And let the hurt sit
Where it belongs

Ashes on the table
Ashes on the table
I say your name
And it stays a little longer
Ashes on the table
Ashes on the table
The sun comes up
But I feel smaller
Ashes on the table
Ashes on the table
One more breath
Then the room gets softer

songs.subject: varied
songs.lyrics:
Sunrise through the blinds it stings
Empty chair at the table sings
A quiet song of what was here
Whispers soft a lonely tear

Ashes and coffee
A bitter brew
Ashes and coffee
What else to do

The world keeps turning what a nerve
My heart a stone I can't unswerv
The phone rings once I let it go
Just me and ghosts a silent show

Ashes and coffee
A bitter brew
Ashes and coffee
What else to do

They say time heals
A

songs.subject: varied
songs.lyrics:
Met you by the pier
Salt on your skin
Sunburn on my shoulders
You grinned and jumped right in
Wet hair, bare feet
Sand in your shorts
You said, "one more drink"
Then we lost the boardwalk

Oh, you kept me close
When the tide rolled up
Hands on my waist
And the moon came up
We knew this was small
But it felt too sweet
Like a spark on the waves
That wouldn't leave

Beach fling, beach fling
You and me
Beach fling, beach fling
Drift with the sea
One hot week
Then we let it be
Beach fling, beach fling
Just you and me
(Beach fling)

Now I got your laugh
Stuck in my phone
A shell in my bag
And your name in my bones
You left with the sun
I left with a tan
Still when I hear the drums
I want that again

Oh, you kept me close
When the tide rolled up
Hands on my waist
And the moon came up
We knew this was small
But it felt too sweet
Like a spark on the waves
That wouldn't leave

Beach fling, beach fling
You and me
Beach fling, beach fling
Drift with the sea
One hot week
Then we let it be
Beach fling, beach fling
Just you and me
(Beach fling)

Call me when the heat comes back
Call me when your train rolls in
I might be bad for forever
But I'm perfect for this little bit
One last dance in the foam
One last kiss in the breeze
Then we wave goodbye
Like it was meant to be

Beach fling, beach fling
You and me
Beach fling, beach fling
Drift with the sea
One hot week
Then we let it be
Beach fling, beach fling
Just you and me
(Beach fling)

songs.subject: varied
songs.lyrics:
You rolled up with salt on your skin
Flip-flops in your hand, grin on your grin
You said, “Meet me where the sand stays hot”
I said, “Boy, you know I just might”
We danced where the umbrellas lean
Your laugh got lost in the splash and sheen
One look and I forgot my name
The tide came in, we played that game

Hold me close, then let me go
Watch the shoreline steal our souls
Sun on your neck, my feet in the foam
One little fling and we’re both gone

Sandy kiss, sandy kiss
One more spin, one more twist
Sandy kiss, sandy kiss
Boy, you know I want this
Sandy kiss, sandy kiss
Drift away, come back quick
Sandy kiss, sandy kiss
Just one night, like this

Your shirt was damp from the ocean spray
We stole each glance, then turned away
I traced your shadow in the heat
You pulled me closer with two left feet
Ice cream melting on your wrist
You said my name like a summer wish
We kept it light, but it felt so loud
Like thunder hiding in the crowd

Hold me close, then let me go
Watch the shoreline steal our souls
Sun on your neck, my feet in the foam
One little fling and we’re both gone

Sandy kiss, sandy kiss
One more spin, one more twist
Sandy kiss, sandy kiss
Boy, you know I want this
Sandy kiss, sandy kiss
Drift away, come back quick
Sandy kiss, sandy kiss
Just one night, like this

If you leave, let the waves decide
If you stay, we stay outside
I don’t need forever tonight
Just your hand and the moon so white

Sandy kiss, sandy kiss
One more spin, one more twist
Sandy kiss, sandy kiss
Boy, you know I want this
Sandy kiss, sandy kiss
Drift away, come back quick
Sandy kiss, sandy kiss
Just one night, like this

songs.subject: varied
songs.lyrics:
You pulled up hot
With your engine mean
I had a bag
And a half-bad dream
We burned the lane
Past the feed store bend
You said, "Keep low"
I said, "Let's go, friend"

Then the dash light died
On that county road
Your hands shook hard
When the smoke came slow

It fell apart
Right off the bat
It fell apart
And that was that
Gravel and ash
Under my boots
We ran too far
For the truth

The back tire blew
By the millhouse fence
You cussed the sky
And I lost sense
Your phone went dark
Mine hit the dirt
We heard that siren
Before the hurt

Then the moon came up
On a broken hood
You stared straight through me
Like I never could

It fell apart
Right off the bat
It fell apart
And that was that
Gravel and ash
Under my boots
We ran too far
For the truth

Now I'm back on foot
With a torn-up plan
Your name still rings
In a rusted can
And that road knows
What I won't say
How fast a lie
Can melt away

It fell apart
Right off the bat
It fell apart
And that was that
Gravel and ash
Under my boots
We ran too far
For the truth
It fell apart
I watched it crack
It fell apart
Ain't coming back

songs.subject: varied
songs.lyrics:
Ran the red by the feed store
Tailgate full of cash
I had a bad map folded
And a half tank of gas
You said, "Just keep it steady"
Like steady was a prayer
But the county line was waiting
With a hard blue glare

Saw the siren off the mirror
Saw your knuckles go white
We were flying off a dead-end
In the heat of the night

Dust on the dash
Dust on the dash
We were gone for a minute
Then it all went to trash
Dust on the dash
Dust on the dash
One wrong turn, one bad look
And the whole thing crashed

Hit the wash by the cattle gate
Mud up to the door
You bailed with the money bag
Spilling bills on the floor
I heard glass in the mesquite
I heard dogs start to bark
Then your boots went running
Right out into the dark

My tires bit the gravel
Then they spun in the rain
You left me with the engine
And a mouth full of shame

Dust on the dash
Dust on the dash
We were gone for a minute
Then it all went to trash
Dust on the dash
Dust on the dash
One wrong turn, one bad look
And the whole thing crashed

Now the moon sits low and mean
On that busted county road
I can taste the copper
In the back of my throat
If you're out there somewhere
With my luck and your lies
Tell the boys I made it
Then tell them that I tried

Dust on the dash
Dust on the dash
We were gone for a minute
Then it all went to trash
Dust on the dash
Dust on the dash
One wrong turn, one bad look
And the whole thing crashed

Yeah, it all went wrong
Fast as a

songs.subject: varied
songs.lyrics:
At the end of the world
there’s a light I know
Salt on the window
Blue on the snow
One small lantern
on a stone-white seam
Keeping its promise
through the storm and deep

And I follow
I follow that gold
Past the dark water
Past the cold

Lighthouse, stay
Lighthouse, stay
You hold the edge
You hold the day
Lighthouse, stay
Lighthouse, stay
I can find home
if you shine my way

Rope on the railing
wet with the rain
Seagulls circling
calling my name
Each wave below me
breaks and bends
Still your window
never ends

And I follow
I follow that gold
Past the dark water
Past the cold

Lighthouse, stay
Lighthouse, stay
You hold the edge
You hold the day
Lighthouse, stay
Lighthouse, stay
I can find home
if you shine my way

If my heart drifts
if my hands shake
If the long night
tries to take
Lift that small flame
high above
I was made for
this kind of love

Lighthouse, stay
Lighthouse, stay
You hold the edge
You hold the day
Lighthouse, stay
Lighthouse, stay
I can find home
if you shine my way

At the end of the world
there’s a light I know
Salt on my shoulders
soft and slow

songs.subject: varied
songs.lyrics:
At the edge of the map, you stand
Salt in your iron hand
One window burning through the rain
One small fire, one name
The gulls go quiet overhead
The sea keeps all you said
And every wave that breaks below
Knows where the lost ones go

You turn, you turn
Through the dark
You keep a thread
Inside my heart

Lighthouse, hold me now
Lighthouse, hold me now
At the end of the world
You still shine somehow
Lighthouse, call me in
Lighthouse, call me in
When the tide pulls hard
You pull me back again

I’ve crossed the black and open miles
With worn-out shoes and wild eyes
But there you are, above the foam
A bone-white promise home
The rocks are sharp, the night is deep
You keep the watch while I can’t sleep
A little flame against the roar
The only door

You turn, you turn
Through the spray
You say my name
And I stay

Lighthouse, hold me now
Lighthouse, hold me now
At the end of the world
You still shine somehow
Lighthouse, call me in
Lighthouse, call me in
When the tide pulls hard
You pull me back again

If I’m the boat, then be the shore
If I’m the wound, be the door
If I go cold, if I drift far
Be that small, unblinking star

Lighthouse, hold me now
Lighthouse, hold me now
At the end of the world
You still shine somehow
Lighthouse, call me in
Lighthouse, call me in
When the tide pulls hard
You pull me back again
Lighthouse, stay with me
Lighthous

songs.subject: varied
songs.lyrics:
The cake slid off the tray
Right into Uncle Ray
The groom wore my tie
And the priest yelled, "Why?"
A cousin lost a shoe
By the punch bowl, too
Your aunt climbed on a chair
And stayed up there

Count it off, one-two
Hold that aisle
They're dancing through
The aisle, the aisle

Broke the chapel gate
Broke the chapel gate
We came to celebrate
Now it's far too late
Broke the chapel gate
Broke the chapel gate
(turn it, spin it, shake)
Broke the chapel gate

The flower girl went wild
With a toast she styled
The best man kissed the lamp
Then he started a chant
A trumpet hit the stairs
Landed in the pears
Your mama took the mic
And screamed all night

Count it off, one-two
Hold that line
They're coming through
In a drunken shine

Broke the chapel gate
Broke the chapel gate
We came to celebrate
Now it's far too late
Broke the chapel gate
Broke the chapel gate
(turn it, spin it, shake)
Broke the chapel gate

Somebody found the keys
In a bowl of peas
The harp went clink-clank
Into the parking bank
The vows got swept away
Under confetti rain
And still you said, "I do"
So we all did too

Broke the chapel gate
Broke the chapel gate
We came to celebrate
Now it's far too late
Broke the chapel gate
Broke the chapel gate
(hey, hey, hey)
Broke the chapel gate

songs.subject: varied
songs.lyrics:
The cake slid off the table
The groom lost both his shoes
Uncle Joe swung from the chandelier
And spilled the pickle juice
A cousin kissed the mayor
Then danced into the band
The flower girl was leading chants
With mustard on her hands

Hey, hey, count it off
One more spin and the roof might pop
Hold your glass, hold your hat
This whole town is way past that

Keg on the dancefloor
Keg on the dancefloor
Everybody yelling more
Keg on the dancefloor
Bride on the table
Groom on the floor
Keg on the dancefloor

The pastor lost his sermon
To a tuba and a scream

Grandma beat the snare drum
With her silver spoon
Now the whole hall’s jumping sideways
To a busted wedding tune

Hey, hey, pass it down
Somebody's boots just left the ground
Spin that mess, clap your hands
Nobody here is makin' plans

Keg on the dancefloor
Keg on the dancefloor
Everybody yelling more
Keg on the dancefloor
Bride on the table
Groom on the floor

The punch bowl hit the wall
The band kept playing faster

Keg on the dancefloor
Keg on the dancefloor

songs.subject: varied
songs.lyrics:
You said come alone
so I wore my calm
At table nine
with the cracked teacup charm
Your left hand shook
when you lit that match
I knew the code
from the way you laughed

No names tonight
just the cut of the deal
Your eyes said stay
but your coat said steel
The room went thin
like a wire in snow
You tapped your glass
and I let it go

Last meeting, last meeting
We both know the score
Last meeting, last meeting
No one knocks this door
Last meeting, last meeting
You chose the dark side
Last meeting, last meeting
I watch you walk by

You slid the file
under the sugar tin
Three clean photos
and a city of sins
The watch on your wrist
had the mark we used
Same tiny scar
from the bridge we burned through
You said the boss
won’t forgive this slip
I said the boss
never knew your grip

The sax in the hall
hit a low bent plea
You read my face
like it read you from me
One last lie
for the road ahead
You smiled like death
then you checked my head

Last meeting, last meeting
We both know the score
Last meeting, last meeting
No one knocks this door
Last meeting, last meeting
You chose the dark side
Last meeting, last meeting
I watch you walk by

In the mirror fog
there was two of us
One still believed
and one knew enough
You raised your cup
like a priest with smoke
I saw the truth
in the words you choked

Last meeting, last meeting
We both know the score
Last meeting, last meeting
No one knocks this door
Last meeting, last meeting
You chose the dark side
Last meeting, last meeting
I watch you walk by

When the door shut soft
I wore your face
Down in the dark
with a borrowed grace
Last meeting, last meeting
Fade into time

songs.subject: varied
songs.lyrics:
The city sleeps, a velvet cloak
But I'm awake, no time for jokes
The streetlights hum a lonely tune
Beneath the pale and watchful moon
A whisper on the evening breeze
Carries secrets through the trees

This last rendezvous, a dangerous game
Two hearts, two lies, whispered your name
The clock ticks slow, a steady beat
Our final dance, bittersweet
This last rendezvous, a deadly art
Playing roles, tearing us apart

Your eyes, they gleam, a knowing spark
Reflecting shadows in the dark
A practiced smile, a gentle hand
Across the table, understand
The coded words, the subtle sign
This final act, yours and mine

This last rendezvous, a dangerous game
Two hearts, two lies, whispered your name
The clock ticks slow, a steady beat
Our final dance, bittersweet
This last rendezvous, a deadly art
Playing roles, tearing us apart

One last sip, the bitter wine
A memory of what was mine
Before the masks, before the fall
Before we risked and lost it all
The price of truth, the cost of trust
Now turns to ashes, turns to dust

This last rendezvous, a dangerous game
Two hearts, two lies, whispered your name
The clock ticks slow, a steady beat
Our final dance, bittersweet

songs.subject: varied
songs.lyrics:
You reach for the kettle
I reach for the bread
You laugh at the old clock
Ticking overhead
I set out two plates
You open the blinds
Same small morning
Still feels like a sign

Blue sock on the chair
Keys in the bowl
You hum in the hallway
And I am whole

Morning, morning
Stay right here
Morning, morning
After all these years
Your hand finds mine
Like it knows the way
Morning, morning
We’re okay (we’re okay)

You butter the toast slow
I cut the pear
Sun on the table
Gold in your hair
The dog by our ankles
The steam in the air
You ask if I slept well
I say, “I was there”

Blue sock on the chair
Keys in the bowl
You hum in the hallway
And I am whole

Morning, morning
Stay right here
Morning, morning
After all these years
Your hand finds mine
Like it knows the way
Morning, morning
We’re okay (we’re okay)

We learned the small things
Make the big things stay
A chipped white mug
A laugh that softens the day
No grand speech
No perfect plan
Just you at the sink
And me as your man

Morning, morning
Stay right here
Morning, morning
After all these years
Your hand finds mine
Like it knows the way
Morning, morning
We’re okay (we’re okay)
Morning, morning
Don’t go away (don’t go away)

songs.subject: varied
songs.lyrics:
Sun on the breadbox
Kettle starts to sing
You tie your robe with one slow knot
I hunt for my ring
Your glasses by the sink
My socks by the chair
We move around each other
Like we’ve always been there

Forty little mornings
In a hundred little ways
You still find my hand
Before the day wakes up

Same old morning
Same sweet light
(Come on, honey)
You kiss my cheek
I make the toast
Same old morning
Feels just right
(Same old morning)
After all these years
You’re my home

You read the paper
I stir the jam
You joke about the weather
Like you know who I am
The spoon taps the mug
The dog bumps your knee
You laugh at my apron strings
Then smile at me

And every folded wrinkle
On your open face
Looks like every road
That brought us here

Same old morning
Same sweet light
(Come on, honey)
You kiss my cheek
I make the toast
Same old morning
Feels just right
(Same old morning)
After all these years
You’re my home

If the ceiling rain
If the house gets cold
If the world goes quiet
You still reach for my hand

Same old morning
Same sweet light
(Come on, honey)
You kiss my cheek
I make the toast
Same old morning
Feels just right
(Same old morning)
After all these years
You’re my

songs.subject: varied
songs.lyrics:
Earth groans
Deep below
Slumber ends
Fissures grow

MOUNTAIN AWAKES!
STONE FLESH RENDS!
WORLD SHAKES!
DESTRUCTION SENDS!

Summit splits
Lava spews
Valleys burn
No one rues

MOUNTAIN AWAKES!
STONE FLESH RENDS!
WORLD SHAKES!
DESTRUCTION SENDS!

Crushing might
Will of stone
Endless night
Hear them moan

MOUN

songs.subject: varied
songs.lyrics:
Under the pine-black sky
It slept with a face of snow
Axes bit and boots passed by
Still the old bones would not show
Deep in the throat of the ridge
A crack ran through the ice
Boulders shivered on the ledge
And the wind forgot its bite

Hear that rumble in the stone
Hear that answer in the ground
Something ancient, something home
Is turning over, turning round

The mountain wakes
The mountain wakes
It shakes the bones
It breaks the lake
The mountain wakes
The mountain wakes
Call your name
And the whole earth quakes

Cedar splinters in the pass
Hoofprints vanish in the mud
Runes burned red against the ash
Old red light beneath the blood
A glacier opens like an eye
Showing ember in the seam
Now the peaks begin to rise
Like a beast inside a dream

Hear that rumble in the stone
Hear that answer in the ground
Something buried, something known
Is turning over, turning round

The mountain wakes
The mountain wakes
It shakes the bones
It breaks the lake
The mountain wakes
The mountain wakes
Call your name
And the whole earth quakes

I saw the summit breathe
I saw the cliffs split wide
The valley dropped to its knees
As the old giant opened its eyes

The mountain wakes
The mountain wakes
It shakes the bones
It breaks the lake
The mountain wakes
The mountain wakes
Call your name
And the whole earth quakes
(Oh)

songs.subject: varied
songs.lyrics:
Badge on her coat
Snow on her shoes
Clock hits six again
She already knew
Paper cup coffee
Cold in her hand
She ties up her hair
And goes back in

Room twelve needs water
Room eight needs peace
Baby in the back hall
Won't fall asleep
She's got two shifts
And one small tree
In her chest
Where the joy should be

Merry on the ward
Merry on the ward
Hold on, baby, hold on
Merry on the ward
She brings the light in
She brings it more
Even on Christmas
Merry on the ward

She checks on the widow
Alone in the blue
Puts a red cap on him
Like he asked her to
A nurse in the doorway
A song on her phone
She hums to the hall
So nobody's alone

Two more hours
Then one more call
She keeps on moving
Through it all
If love had a uniform
It'd look like this
Tired eyes shining
With a paper gift

Merry on the ward
Merry on the ward
Hold on, baby, hold on
Merry on the ward
She brings the light in
She brings it more
Even on Christmas
Merry on the ward

When the halls go quiet
And the hours bite
She leans on the counter
Under soft green light
A tiny wrapped orange
In her bag for later
One deep breath
Then back to the labor

Merry on the ward
Merry on the ward
Hold on, baby, hold on
Merry on the ward
She brings the light in
She brings it more
Even on Christmas
Merry on the ward
Oh, mercy on the ward
Merry on the ward
Hallelujah, darling
Merry on the ward

songs.subject: varied
songs.lyrics:
Clock says six
She ties her hair
Cold badge gleams
By the breakroom chair
Gift bag torn
Under folded charts
She learned long ago
How to split her heart

Two floors up
And the waiting room's packed
Little feet in socks
A father in the back
She checks the pulse
Then she checks the time
A paper cup of coffee
Gone lukewarm by nine

And she hums low
Through the hallway glow
One more room
Before she goes
There’s snow on the glass
But she stays in the storm
Holding strangers steady
Keeping all them warm

On Christmas, she stays
On Christmas, she gives
On Christmas, she loves
The way a healer lives
Tinsel on her scrubs
Red eyes, tired hands
She makes room for hurt
Like only she can
On Christmas, she stays
On Christmas, she gives

By midnight call
Her phone lights up once
A kid on speaker
Says, “Mama, are you coming?”
She smiles through glass
At the tiny wrapped tree
Then folds that ache
So the bed can breathe

And she hums low
Through the hallway glow
One more room
Before she goes
There’s snow on the glass
But she stays in the storm
Holding strangers steady
Keeping all them warm

On Christmas, she stays
On Christmas, she gives
On Christmas, she loves
The way a healer lives
Tinsel on her scrubs
Red eyes, tired hands
She makes room for hurt
Like only she can
On Christmas, she stays
On Christmas, she gives

Sand in my shoes
Board under my arm

Smiling so calm
Morning was glass
Now the water wakes
I’m reading the sets

Hold me back
Don’t let me jump too soon
I can feel it turn

Perfect wave
Perfect wave
Take me there
Perfect wave
Perfect wave
Perfect wave

Take me there

I paddle hard
And let the fear pass
Sun on my back
Salt on my face

Can change the day

Hold me back
Don’t let me jump too soon
I can feel it turn
Out past the blue

Perfect wave
Perfect wave
Take me there
Perfect wave
Perfect wave
Perfect wave
Roll me clean
Take me there

For a second I’m weightless
For a second I know
Every missed tide

Perfect wave
Roll me clean
Take me there

Salt on my skin
Morning on the pier
And I'm paddling in

Blue glass, clean and slow
I see it out the corner
And I let it go

Dig in deep
Everybody's staring
But I don't blink
Horizon bends
My heart runs fast
One more push
And I'm on the path

Chasing the perfect wave

Chasing the perfect wave

I lean into the turn

Kick my fins
Dig in deep
Everybody's staring

Horizon bends
My heart runs fast

Chasing the perfect wave
Chasing the perfect wave

Chasing the perfect wave

From the edge of the shore

Chasing the perfect wave

songs.subject: varied
songs.lyrics:
One sheep, two sheep
On the fence they sway
Three sheep, four sheep
They won’t go away
Five sheep, six sheep
Wearing tiny shoes
Seven sheep, eight sheep
Making mischief moves

Count them slow
Count them slow
They won’t behave
But still, they grow
Count them slow
Count them slow
One sheep jumps
And two drift low

One sheep naps
Then wakes to race
Two sheep grin
And switch the place
Three sheep sing
With a crooked hum
Four sheep roll
On a moonlit drum

Count them slow
Count them slow
They won’t behave
But still, they grow
Count them slow
Count them slow
One sheep jumps
And two drift low

Hush now, dear
Let them run
Past the moon
Past the sun
If they leap
If they shout
Close your eyes
And let them out

Count them slow
Count them slow
They won’t behave
But still, they grow
Count them slow
Count them slow
One sheep jumps
And sleep comes home

songs.subject: varied
songs.lyrics:
One sheep, two sheep, on the fence
One climbs up, and makes a mess
Three sheep, four, with muddy feet
They drum the floor and skip the beat

I try to count slow
I try to count low
But one rolls over
And laughs in my pillow

Sleep, you rebel sheep
Please be sweet
Sleep, you rebel sheep
Stay in a row
Sleep, you rebel sheep
Soft and slow
Sleep, you rebel sheep
Home you go

Five sheep, six sheep, out the pen
Seven comes back, then jumps again
Eight wears a flower in her wool
Nine says "no" and acts so cool

I try to count slow
I try to count low
But one kicks petals
All over my toes

Sleep, you rebel sheep
Please be sweet
Sleep, you rebel sheep
Stay in a row
Sleep, you rebel sheep
Soft and slow
Sleep, you rebel sheep
Home you go

One turned moonlight into a game
One said my blanket knew his name
So I just smile and dim the light
Let the wild flock rock me through the night

Sleep, you rebel sheep
Please be sweet
Sleep, you rebel sheep
Stay in a row
Sleep, you rebel sheep
Soft and slow
Sleep, you rebel sheep
Home you go
Sleep, you rebel sheep
Close your eyes
Sleep, you rebel sheep
Till morning sky

songs.subject: varied
songs.lyrics:
They took my colors
They stole my lines
Thought they could own it
Thought they could shine
My heart on the canvas
My soul in the strokes
They tried to erase it
Their biggest jokes

But a fire still burns deep inside
You can't steal what makes me truly alive

This unseen canvas
It still breathes and sighs
My unseen canvas
Reflects in my eyes
You can't cage the wild thing
You can't steal the light
My unseen canvas
Shines ever so bright

They copied the curves
They mimicked the shade
A pale imitation
A cheap masquerade
They thought I'd surrender
Just fade into grey
But every new sunrise
Brings a brand new day

I paint with the thunder
I draw with the rain
My art is my freedom
It washes the pain
You built your empire
On lies and on greed
But truth is a wildfire
A powerful seed

This unseen canvas
It still breathes and sighs
My unseen canvas
Reflects in

songs.subject: varied
songs.lyrics:
You took the sketch off my table
Left crumbs on the floor
You wore my colors in public
Then swore they were yours
I saw my name in the margins
Cut clean from the page
Like you could peel off the bloodline
And walk out with the cage

But I know every line
I know every scar
You can change the frame
You can't change the heart

Hands off my frame
(Hands off my frame)
You can't wear my flame
(You can't wear my flame)
Say my name again
You still can't take the pain
Hands off my frame
(Hands off my frame)

You sold my midnight to strangers
Called it your own gold
Put your grin on the poster
Like you didn't get told
But every room that you enter
Hears my steps in the walls
And every lie that you lace up
Gets heavier when it falls

Yeah, I know every line
I know every scar
You can change the frame
You can't change the heart

Hands off my frame
(Hands off my frame)
You can't wear my flame
(You can't wear my flame)
Say my name again
You still can't take the pain
Hands off my frame
(Hands off my frame)

I made it out of the pressure
Out of the wreck and the rain
You only found a window
I built the whole damn frame
So keep your copy and silence
Keep your paper crown
When the crowd wants the truth
They'll know where it came from now

Hands off my frame
(Hands off my frame)
You can't wear my flame
(You can't wear my flame)
Say my name again
You still can't take the pain
Hands off my frame
(Hands off my frame)
Hands off my frame
(Hands off my frame)

songs.subject: varied
songs.lyrics:
The cab door sticks on the curb
Your coat is heavy with rain
I watch you shake out the dark
From your hair and your sleeve
One red taillight on the block
Pulses through the glass

Tell me you feel it too
This wet, slow pull
The whole town holding its breath
Under the rails

Stay in the rain with me
Stay in the rain with me
I know the night is long
But I don't want to go
Stay in the rain with me
Stay in the rain with me
Your hand in my coat
Feels like home

A shop sign buzzes and fades
Two paper cups on the ledge
The crosswalk paints your shoes
In silver and bruised blue
Somewhere a train cuts through
And leaves a seam in the black

Tell me you feel it too
This wet, slow pull
The whole town holding its breath
Under the rails

Stay in the rain with me
Stay in the rain with me
I know the night is long
But I don't want to go
Stay in the rain with me
Stay in the rain with me
Your hand in my coat
Feels like home

If morning comes too fast
Let it wait outside
Let the puddles keep our names
A little while
I can live here
In the spill of your eyes

Stay in the rain with me
Stay in the rain with me
I know the night is long
But I don't want to go
Stay in the rain with me
Stay in the rain with me
Your hand in my coat
Feels like home

songs.subject: varied
songs.lyrics:
Wet tires on stone
Under a bent old sign
You walk through the hiss
With your hands in your sleeves
Every window glows
Then turns away from you
I know that look
It lives in me too

The river runs black
Past the loading bays
Your name on my tongue
Like a thing I can't say
The sky leans low
The alleys bend in
And everything you touched
Looks like it might rain again

Rain on cinder
Rain on cinder
Hold me here
Till the whole block blurs
Rain on cinder
Rain on cinder
Stay with me
Till the dark gets soft

A train cuts through
Far past the market stalls
The puddles shake
With the wires and the calls
You said be brave
But your voice went thin
Now the bridge lights fade
And the cold gets in

The river runs black
Past the loading bays
Your name on my tongue
Like a thing I can't say
The sky leans low
The alleys bend in
And everything you touched
Looks like it might rain again

Rain on cinder
Rain on cinder
Hold me here
Till the whole block blurs
Rain on cinder
Rain on cinder
Stay with me
Till the dark gets soft

If we disappear
Let the rain keep score
Of the broken steps
And the slammed front doors
I was almost gone
When you turned your face
Now the night holds us
In a half-lit place

Rain on cinder
Rain on cinder
Hold me here
Till the wh

songs.subject: varied
songs.lyrics:
At the table by the window
Bubbe taps her heel
Her mother keeps the rhythm
With a silver spoon and grin
Little feet in polished shoes
Circle round the floor
Three generations laughing
Then they ask for more

Spin it, spin it, dear ones
Lift your hands up high
Hear the old song waking
In the baby's eyes

Dance, dance, lively now
Dance, dance, all around
Bubbe, mother, child
Dance, dance, lively now
Three generations proud
Kicking up the ground

Uncle claps the beat out
While the candles shine
Grandpa beats the table
Like he owns the time
A veil goes flying upward
A laugh breaks through the room
Every step says blessing
Every step says bloom

Spin it, spin it, dear ones
Lift your hands up high
Hear the old song waking
In the baby's eyes

Dance, dance, lively now
Dance, dance, all around
Bubbe, mother, child
Dance, dance, lively now
Three generations proud
Kicking up the ground

From the old country stories
To the new hometown floor
Same bright feet keep moving
Same warm heart wants more
Hearts in a holy circle
Hands in honest song
What was passed through sorrow
Makes the joy grow strong

Dance, dance, lively now
Dance, dance, all around
Bubbe, mother, child
Dance, dance, lively now
Three generations proud
Kicking up the ground
Dance, dance, lively now
Let the whole room sound

songs.subject: varied
songs.lyrics:
Grandma taps her heel
On the tile by the chair
Papa in his good shoes
Spins Mama through the air
The child grabs a sleeve
Laughing at the swirl
Three names in one room
Turning like a pearl

Raise the glass
Hear the cheers
Old songs wake
After years
Hands lift high
Feet unlock
Everybody make the круг
Come on, drop the block

Dance, dance, dance tonight
Three generations in the light
Dance, dance, dance tonight
(hey!) Keep the circle tight
From the old to the small
We answer the call
Dance, dance, dance tonight
All of us, all of us

Uncle beats the table
With a spoon and grin
Auntie sings the top line
Then the low joins in
Baby on the hip now
Claps two tiny hands
Even the shy cousin
Starts to understand

Raise the glass
Hear the cheer
Love came far
To get here
Step by step
Room by room
Every heart says
Make some room

Dance, dance, dance tonight
Three generations in the light
Dance, dance, dance tonight
(hey!) Keep the circle tight
From the old to the small
We answer the call
Dance, dance, dance tonight
All of us, all of us

Let the room go wide
Let the floor be home
Grandma shows the turn
Then the young ones roam
One long chain of hands
One bright family flame
Same old wedding joy
New smiles, same name

Dance, dance, dance tonight
Three generations in the light
Dance, dance, dance tonight
(hey!) Kee

songs.subject: varied
songs.lyrics:
I fold the flaps down slow
Brown tape in my teeth
The last plate in the box
A whole year under me
Your mug in the corner
Like it knows my name
I press it all the way
And the silence stays

One more strip
One more press
Hands shaking
But I do my best
The marker slips
Across the top
I write the date
Then I stop

Last box taped up
Last box taped up
I can hear the room breathe
As I let it go
Last box taped up
Last box taped up
Baby, if I cry now
Let it be soft

The broom leans by the door
Bare floor, empty frame
There’s a ring in the wall
Where the picture used to hang
I found a spare key
In the sugar drawer
Funny how small things
Still feel like more

One more strip
One more press
Hands shaking
But I do my best
The marker slips
Across the top
I write the date
Then I stop

Last box taped up
Last box taped up
I can hear the room breathe
As I let it go
Last box taped up
Last box taped up
Baby, if I cry now
Let it be soft

I leave the scissors
On the counter by the sink
I stand there a minute
Trying not to think
The truck out front
Starts its low slow groan
And I lift that box
Like it weighs the home

Last box taped up
Last box taped up
I can hear the room breathe
As I let it go
Last box taped up
Last box taped up
Baby, if I cry now
Let it be soft
Last box taped up
Last box taped up
I turn the latch and leave
What we made behind

songs.subject: varied
songs.lyrics:
Cardboard dust on my hands
One lamp left in the hall
I fold the flaps down slow
Like I’m learning to let go
The marker dried out blue
On the side of the box

You said, take your time
So I did
I found a mug
In the back of the fridge
And the last roll of tape
Stuck to my wrist

Last box taped up tight
Last box by the door
Last box in the truck
And the room is yours no more
Last box taped up tight
I can’t stay here tonight
(Last box taped up tight)

There’s a dent in the wall
From the bed you helped me move
A single screw in a cup
And a little bit of glue
I can hear my shoes
On the empty floor

You said, take your time
So I did
Now the windows are bare
And the shelves are stripped
I press the tape flat
And I let it sit

Last box taped up tight
Last box by the door
Last box in the truck
And the room is yours no more
Last box taped up tight
I can’t stay here tonight
(Last box taped up tight)

The hallway smells like paper
And old paint
I keep one hand on the doorframe
Like it might
Say my name
But it stays still
So I breathe in
And I let go

Last box taped up tight
Last box by the door
Last box in the truck
And the room is yours no more
Last box taped up tight
I can’t stay here tonight
Last box taped up tight
I’m finally outside
(Last box taped up tight)
